title: Friendship
description: 友谊模组是一个为MC多人游玩设计的关系成长模组。Friendship is a relationship-growth mod designed for multiplayer Minecraft.
body:
# 🤝 Friendship - 友谊 ✨

友谊模组是一个为 MC 多人游玩设计的关系成长模组。

它不会强迫你组队、打卡或刷任务，而是让这个世界记住你和朋友之间真实发生过的事：你们一起待了多久，互相做过哪些互动，谁送过花，谁把谁踹飞，谁又在濒死的时候被朋友拉了一把……

如果你有固定一起玩的朋友，这个模组会让你们的关系在存档里一点点长出来。

## 🌱 如何开始

先摘一朵花，送给你的朋友。💐

按 `Z` 打开友谊面板，你可以查看附近玩家、处理好友关系、查看今天的互动记录和你们留下的回忆。新玩家第一次接触模组时，也会有简单的教程引导，不需要先读一大堆配置说明。

建立关系之后，你们只要正常一起玩就会逐渐积累友谊值。待在 30 格（可配置）以内、同一个世界，友谊就会慢慢增长。每天有成长上限，所以它更鼓励长期陪伴，而不是一口气刷满。

## 🎮 这个模组会带来什么

### 🔥 关系会成长

朋友之间有 7 个火花等级。等级越高，解锁的互动越多：从最开始的摸头、送花，到后面的传送、扛起朋友甚至将他甩飞出去、灵魂互通和濒死救援。

这些能力不是为了让你变强，而是为了让你们有更多能一起制造回忆的瞬间。

### 🫶 日常互动有反馈

空手右键朋友可以摸头，手持花可以送花，手持食物可以喂食。它们不一定给强力 buff，但会有粒子、声音、动画和记录反馈。🤚💐🍖

你也可以用 `Z` 对朋友发动恶作剧踢，把他一脚踢飞；潜行加 `Z` 可以把朋友扛起来，扛着时按 `X` 可以把他甩出去。🦶🏋️🚀

### 🌟 不管你在哪，我来了

达到 2级火花后，可以使用传送能力。按 `Shift + X` 读条 3 秒，传送到在线朋友身边。它不限制距离，也不限制维度，但有冷却时间。

这不是传统意义上的传送点系统，而是一个很直接的多人体验：朋友需要你，你就过去。

### 💞 灵魂互通

3级火花解锁灵魂互通。

对准朋友按 `X`，两个人会进入连接状态。连接期间，你们的生命变化会被绑定在一起，并且可以切换到对方视角进行移动和攻击操作。任何一方都可以主动断开。

### ❤️ 朋友在身边时，你没那么容易死

4级火花解锁濒死救援。如果你受到致命伤害，而 30 格内有朋友，系统会把你传送到朋友身边，保留一点生命，并给予短暂保护。

PS：如果你安装了哇哇大哭模组，那么死亡处理优先级为：

1. 不死图腾
2. Big Cry 被动哭泣
3. Friendship 濒死救援

### ⚙️ 配置与好友面板

友谊面板不只是好友列表，也可以用来了解你和每个好友的相处情况：火花等级、相识天数、今日进度、互动记录、回忆和技能状态都会集中显示。

你也可以给好友设置不超过 4 个字的备注（详见 [✨ 备注系统](#备注系统)）。（中文标签栏有一种网易MC的感觉）

面板中还提供设置入口，可以调整教程提示、语音群聊权限和部分联动行为。你可以按自己的服务器玩法决定哪些功能更主动，哪些功能更安静。

## 🔥 火花等级

| 等级 | 基础互动 | 技能 | 恶作剧 |
|------|----------|------|--------|
| 未结火花 | 摸头、送花、喂食 | - | - |
| 1级火花 | - | 友军免伤 | 脚踹 |
| 2级火花 | - | 传送 | 扛起 |
| 3级火花 | - | 灵魂互通 | 甩飞 |
| 4级火花 | - | 濒死救援 | - |
| 5级火花 | 待更新 ✨ | - | - |
| 6级火花 | 当前最高等级，功能待更新 ✨ | - | - |

## 📖 世界会记得

按 `Z` 打开友谊 UI，可以看到两个核心记录：

- 最近记录：今天发生过的互动，比如摸头、送花、升级、恶作剧。📝
- 回忆：会永久保存在存档里的重要事件，比如第一次成为朋友、每次升级、救援、相识 7 天、30 天、100 天、一年，以及那些值得讲很久的整活瞬间。📚

就算关系解除，历史回忆也不会被简单抹掉。这个世界记住的是你们曾经发生过的事。

## 🏅 成就

模组包含 12 个进度成就，有温柔的，也有不太正经的：

| 成就 | 条件 |
|------|------|
| 初次火花 | 交到第一个朋友 |
| 六级火花 | 与朋友达到六级火花 |
| 摸鱼达人 | 摸头朋友 50 次 |
| 你有点无礼了 | 扛着朋友走 1000 格 |
| 人肉炮弹 | 扔朋友 30 次 |
| 无影脚 | 恶作剧 20 次 |
| 我在你死不了 | 救队友 5 次 |
| 花言巧语 | 送花 30 次 |
| 孩子多吃点 | 喂食朋友 30 次 |
| 海内存知己 | 3 个朋友同时达到 Lv.3+ |
| 蜜月期 | 连续 3 天火花拉满 |
| 大力出奇迹 | 被整蛊后坠落 10 格以上 |

## ✨ 额外亮点功能

这两个功能有足够的价值独立成一个模组，而 Friendship 将它们融合在一起：

### 🏷️ 备注系统

你可以给好友设置自定义昵称（支持中文），设置后**在你的视角中**——好友标签栏、聊天栏、Tab 列表都会统一显示你设定的备注名。

这相当于一个**私人联系人备注系统**：你可以按自己的习惯给朋友起专属昵称，不再需要记 ID，也不用担心好友改名。每个玩家看到的都是自己设定的名字，互不干扰。

### 📜 FTB 任务独立模式

FTB Quests 默认队伍共享任务进度，但友谊模组可以实现同一FTB team下游玩的各自保留个人FTB任务进度！

Friendship 在设置面板中提供切换开关，允许每个玩家选择任务同步方式：
- **原版模式**：队伍共享进度（FTB 原版行为）
- **独立模式**（默认）：保留个人进度，不受队伍影响

对于水槽服、群组服、长期生存服来说，这个功能解决了 FTB Quests 在多人环境下组队与个人成就感之间的矛盾。

## 🔗 模组联动

Friendship 可以和其他模组产生互动：

| 模组 | 联动内容 |
|------|----------|
| [Big Cry 哇哇大哭 😢](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-cry) | 可以安慰正在哭的朋友，获得额外友谊值；如果对方是被动濒死哭泣，还可以把他扶起来 |
| [Order To Cook 下单了 🍳](https://modrinth.com/mod/order-to-cook) | 可以对 NPC 顾客摸头、送花、喂食，播放粒子和音效，但不会增长友谊值 |
| [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) | 如果服务器安装了语音聊天模组，可以通过友谊面板邀请好友加入语音群聊，让固定搭档更容易聚到同一个频道 |
| FTB Quests | 可在设置中切换任务同步方式，支持[独立模式](#ftb-任务独立模式)保留个人任务进度 |

## 🧭 适合谁

这个模组适合多人服务器、朋友小服、长期生存服，或者任何一群经常一起上线的人。

它不适合想要快速刷满数值、追求强力装备成长、或者只想要纯工具功能的玩法。Friendship 的重点不是效率，而是关系、互动和存档里的记忆。

## 📦 依赖与版本

- 目前支持 Fabric 1.21.1、NeoForge 1.21.1。
- 需要 GeckoLib 作为前置模组。
- 完整支持中文与英文。
- Forge 1.20.1 正在同步中。

## 💬 总结

友谊模组不只是让你添加一个好友。它让这个世界知道——你们真的一起玩过。

---

## 🌐 English Description

Friendship is a relationship-growth mod designed for multiplayer Minecraft.

It does not force you into parties, daily quests, or grind loops. Instead, it lets the world remember what actually happened between you and your friends: how long you stayed together, who interacted with whom, who gave flowers, who kicked someone away, and who was saved by a friend at the edge of death.

If you have people you regularly play with, this mod lets that bond slowly grow inside the save.

## 🌱 Getting Started

Pick a flower and give it to your friend. 💐

Press `Z` while looking at air to open the Friendship Panel. From there, you can view nearby players, manage friend relationships, check recent interactions, and read the memories you have created together.

New players will also receive simple tutorial hints, so you do not need to read a long manual before playing.

Once a friendship is formed, you can gain friendship naturally by playing together. Stay within 30 blocks, remain in the same world, and your spark will slowly grow. There is a daily cap, so the system rewards long-term companionship instead of one-session grinding.

## 🎮 What This Mod Adds

### 🔥 Growing Sparks

Friends have 7 spark levels. Higher levels unlock more interactions, from headpats and flowers to teleporting, carrying, throwing, Soul Link, and emergency rescue.

These features are not meant to make you overpowered. They exist to create moments you and your friends will remember.

### 🫶 Everyday Interactions

Right-click a friend with an empty hand to headpat them. Hold a flower to give it to them. Hold food to feed them. These interactions come with particles, sounds, animations, and records. 🤚💐🍖

You can also press `Z` while looking at a friend to kick them away, press `Shift + Z` to carry them, and press `X` while carrying them to throw them. 🦶🏋️🚀

### 🌟 Teleport

At Level 2 Spark, you unlock Teleport.

Press `Shift + X` to channel for 3 seconds, then teleport to an online friend. It ignores distance and dimension, but has a cooldown.

This is not a waypoint system. It is a simple multiplayer promise: if your friend needs you, you can go to them.

### 💞 Soul Link

At Level 3 Spark, you unlock Soul Link.

Look at your friend and press `X` to enter a linked state. While linked, your life changes are bound together, and you can switch into your friend's perspective to move and attack with them. Either side can end the link.

### ❤️ Help You Up

At Level 4 Spark, you unlock Help You Up.

If you take fatal damage while a qualified friend is within 30 blocks, you will be moved to their side, kept alive with a little health, and given brief protection.

If Big Cry is installed, death handling follows this priority:

1. Totem of Undying
2. Big Cry passive crying
3. Friendship Help You Up

### ⚙️ Settings and Friend Panel

The Friendship Panel is more than a friend list. It helps you understand your relationship with each friend, including spark level, days known, daily progress, interaction records, memories, and skill status.

You can also set a short nickname for each friend (see [🏷️ Nickname System](#nickname-system-personal)), up to 4 characters in Chinese or 8 in other languages.

The panel also includes settings for tutorial hints, voice group permissions, and selected integration behavior, so servers can keep the experience as active or quiet as they prefer.

## 🔥 Spark Levels

| Level | Basic Interactions | Skills | Pranks |
|------|--------------------|--------|--------|
| Unlit Spark | Headpat, Give Flower, Feed | - | - |
| Level 1 Spark | - | Friendly Fire Immunity | Kick |
| Level 2 Spark | - | Teleport | Carry |
| Level 3 Spark | - | Soul Link | Throw |
| Level 4 Spark | - | Help You Up | - |
| Level 5 Spark | Coming soon | - | - |
| Level 6 Spark | Current max level, feature coming later | - | - |

## 📖 The World Remembers

Press `Z` to open the Friendship Panel and view two types of records:

- Recent records: interactions from today, such as headpats, flowers, level-ups, and pranks.
- Memories: permanent events saved in the world, such as becoming friends for the first time, leveling up, being rescued, knowing each other for 7 / 30 / 100 / 365 days, and those chaotic moments worth talking about later.

Even if the relationship ends, past memories are not simply erased. The world remembers that you were once there together.

## 🏅 Advancements

The mod includes 12 advancements, some wholesome and some less serious:

| Advancement | Requirement |
|-------------|-------------|
| First Spark | Become friends with someone |
| Level 6 Spark | Reach Level 6 Spark with a friend |
| Headpat Master | Headpat your friend 50 times |
| Carrier | Carry your friend 1000 blocks |
| Human Cannonball | Throw your friend 30 times |
| Prank King | Prank your friend 20 times |
| Guardian Angel | Save your friend from death 5 times |
| Sweet Talker | Give flowers to your friend 30 times |
| Foodie Alliance | Feed your friend 30 times |
| Wide Circle | Have 3 friends at Level 3 Spark or higher |
| Honeymoon | Maintain a 3-day spark streak |
| Miracle Move | Fall 10 blocks or more after being pranked |

## ✨ Extra Highlights

These two features are powerful enough to stand alone as independent mods — Friendship brings them together.

### 🏷️ Nickname System (Personal)

You can set custom nicknames (up to 4 characters, Chinese supported) for your friends. Once set, **from your perspective** — the friend tag bar, chat messages, and Tab list will all display your chosen nickname.

Think of it as a **personal contact nickname system**: give your friends whatever names you like, no more memorizing UUIDs or worrying about name changes. Each player sees only their own nicknames, completely independent.

### 📜 FTB Quest Independent Mode

FTB Quests shares progress across the team by default. Friendship lets players in the same FTB team keep their **individual quest progress**!

The settings panel provides a toggle for each player:
- **Vanilla Mode**: Team-shared progress (default FTB behavior)
- **Independent Mode** (default): Keep personal progress, unaffected by team changes

For kitchen sink servers, group servers, and long-term survival worlds, this feature solves a core FTB Quests pain point — no more losing personal progress just because you're in a team.

## 🔗 Integrations

Friendship can interact with other mods:

| Mod | Integration |
|-----|-------------|
| [Big Cry 😢](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-cry) | Comfort a crying friend for extra friendship. If the cry was triggered by passive near-death behavior, you can help them recover |
| [Order To Cook 🍳](https://modrinth.com/mod/order-to-cook) | Headpat, give flowers to, and feed NPC customers with particles and sounds, without increasing friendship |
| [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)  | If a voice chat mod is installed, the Friendship Panel can invite friends into a voice group so close partners can gather in the same channel more easily |
| FTB Quests | The settings panel can switch quest sync behavior, supporting [Independent Mode](#ftb-quest-independent-mode) to preserve individual progress |

## 🧭 Who Is It For?

This mod is for multiplayer servers, small friend groups, long-term survival worlds, and anyone who regularly plays with the same people.

It is not designed for fast stat grinding, power progression, or pure utility. Friendship is about relationships, interactions, and memories inside the world.

## 📦 Dependencies and Versions

- Currently supports Fabric 1.21.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1.
- Requires GeckoLib.
- Fully supports English and Simplified Chinese.
- Forge 1.20.1 is being synchronized.

## 💬 Summary

Friendship is not just about adding someone to a friend list. It lets the world know that you really played together.
